fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact you assign the job responsibility.

fields.name: Job Responsibility Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the job responsibility you have assigned to the contact.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person to whom you are assigning job responsibilities.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company for which the contact person works.
